message:
test(quota_gate): add integration tests for cost+rate+account pipeline (ft-2dss0)

10 integration tests exercising the full quota gate pipeline:
- Happy path (all clear)
- Budget warning/critical scenarios
- Rate limit fully/partially limited
- Account exhaustion
- Combined multi-signal scenarios (3x warn, 3x block)
- Cross-provider budget isolation
- Telemetry accumulation
- Dashboard-to-gate data flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
